title: TKI-associated proteinuria and nephrotic syndrome: a narrative review with clinical illustration in radio-iodine-refractory thyroid cancer.
abstract: This article aims to highlight proteinuria and nephrotic syndrome as significant yet under-recognized adverse events of VEGF pathway inhibition by tyrosine kinase inhibitors (TKIs), illustrated in the treatment of radioiodine-refractory differentiated thyroid cancer.
trial_name: Cabozantinib for Radioiodine-Refractory Differentiated Thyroid Cancer
